title: Thunderbird has stopped receiving emails.  I followed the instructions I found. restet cache, I have enough memory checked login credentials (I have been sending and receiving for months with no problems) restarted phone. 8 am getting no error messages
creator: perry13
content:
Thunderbird has stopped receiving emails. I followed the instructions I found. restet cache, I have enough memory, hosting service account space is adequate, checked login credentials (I have been sending and receiving for months with no problems) restarted phone. I am getting no error messages.

This happened with my last email program and I installed Thunderbird after no one could find a problem.
